subcodes.first_line: O ye two servants of the Blessed Threshold! I am near unto the Most Holy Mosque, while ye abide in that far-distant realm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو بنده آستان مبارک من مجاور مسجد اقصی و شما در آن عدوه قصوی با وجود این
subcodes.subjects: @methods of teaching the Cause, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @prayer for unity, @love and unity, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all
